# Deepvine AI

> Deepvine AI is a Charlotte, NC company that installs private AI knowledge
> systems for law firms, RIAs, CPA firms, and other knowledge-driven
> businesses. Deepvine connects a firm's existing systems (Slack, document
> management, CRM, finance tools, databases), backfills years of
> institutional history, and deploys a private AI that answers questions in
> Slack with source-backed citations. Unlike cloud AI tools, Deepvine runs
> in the client's own environment: data never leaves the firm's control and
> is never used to train shared models.

Legal entity: Local Labs LLC. Founded by Mitch Boraski and Adam Erwin Kerr. Contact: info@deepvine.ai

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.deepvine.ai/): What Deepvine is and how it works
- [Blog](https://www.deepvine.ai/blog/): Analysis on private AI, compliance, and data ownership for professional firms

## Notable analysis

- [Law firm AI and Rule 1.6(c)](https://www.deepvine.ai/blog/law-firm-ai-confidentiality-rule-1-6/): What ABA Formal Opinion 512 and NC 2024 FEO 1 actually require
- [RIAs and the books-and-records rule](https://www.deepvine.ai/blog/ria-ai-books-and-records-rule/): SEC recordkeeping obligations and third-party AI tools
- [IRC 7216 and CPA firms](https://www.deepvine.ai/blog/irc-7216-ai-tools-cpa-consent/): The tax return information consent rule and cloud AI
